description_long: This filing cabinet is a rectangular, boxy structure with a smooth, wood-textured exterior in a muted grayish-brown tone. The surface appears seamless, with no visible handles, drawers, or label holders, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The cabinet's finish is matte, with subtle wood grain patterns running vertically along the sides and horizontally across the top. Its solid build suggests it is constructed primarily from wood or a wood composite, likely with a hollow interior for storage. The overall form is monolithic, with sharp, clean edges and no decorative elements. This object would fit well in contemporary office or storage environments, blending functionality with understated design.
description: A minimalist, rectangular filing cabinet with a smooth, grayish-brown wood texture and no visible handles or drawers. Its seamless, modern design features subtle wood grain and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat, featureless wood-textured surface with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: This side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same seamless wood texture and lack of visible features.
description_view_2: The rear view continues the minimalist design, with no distinguishing marks or hardware.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the other sides, maintaining the uniform wood grain and smooth finish.
